profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Paperocks Indonesia Tbk engages in the manufacture and sale of food-grade paper packaging for restaurants, cafes, bakeries, hotels, and other food businesses in Indonesia. The company offers paper cups, plastic cups, paper wraps, paper bowls, rice bowls, snack boxes, soup cups, paper boxes, rice/burger wraps, lunch boxes, ice cream cups, hot paper cups, cold paper cups, and paper bags. It exports its products to approximately 20 countries. PT Paperocks Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia.
